name: image_load_side_load_chrome_frame_helper
raw_query: any where file.path:"*\\chrome_frame_helper.dll" and (not (file.path like~ ("C:\\Program Files\\Google\\Chrome\\Application\\*", "C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Google\\Chrome\\Application\\*"))) and (not file.path:"*\\AppData\\local\\Google\\Chrome\\Application\\*")
